title: GCC subobject-linkage error
body:
Running a modified t_uvm_todo gave a GCC error

```
g++ -O0 -I. -Wall -Wextra -Wfloat-conversion -Wlogical-op -Werror -I/svaha/wsnyder/SandBox/homecvs/v4/verilator/test_regress/../include -I/svaha/wsnyder/SandBox/\
homecvs/v4/verilator/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TIMING=1 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-pro\
tection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-var\
iable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT -fcoroutines -c -o Vt_uvm_todo_vm_classes_26.o Vt_uvm_todo_vm_classes_26.cpp

In file included from vt.cpp:2:
Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_mem_region__Vclpkg__DepSet_hf0d4cbc1__0.cpp: In member function 'VlCoroutine Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_mem_region::__VnoI\
nFunc_write(Vt_uvm_todo__Syms*, IData&, QData, QData, IData, VlClassRef<Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_reg_map>, VlClassRef<Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_se\
quence_base>, IData, VlClassRef<Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_object>, std::string, IData)':
Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_mem_region__Vclpkg__DepSet_hf0d4cbc1__0.cpp:35:1: error: 'Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_mem_region::__VnoInFunc_write(Vt_uvm_\
todo__Syms*, IData&, QData, QData, IData, VlClassRef<Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_reg_map>, VlClassRef<Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequence_base>, IData\
, VlClassRef<Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_object>, std::string, IData)::_ZN43Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_mem_region17__VnoInFunc_writeEP17Vt_uvm_todo__S\
ymsRjmmj10VlClassRefI40Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_reg_mapES3_I46Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequence_baseEjS3_I39Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_obje\
ctENSt7__cxx1112basic_stringIcSt11char_traitsIcESaIcEEEj.Frame' has a field 'Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_mem_region::__VnoInFunc_write(Vt_uvm_todo__Syms*, I\
Data&, QData, QData, IData, VlClassRef<Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_reg_map>, VlClassRef<Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequence_base>, IData, VlClassRef<V\
t_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_object>, std::string, IData)::_ZN43Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_mem_region17__VnoInFunc_writeEP17Vt_uvm_todo__SymsRjmmj10VlCl\
assRefI40Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_reg_mapES3_I46Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_sequence_baseEjS3_I39Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_objectENSt7__cxx11\
12basic_stringIcSt11char_traitsIcESaIcEEEj.Frame::T003_3_4' whose type has no linkage [-Werror=subobject-linkage]
```

Where editing Vt_uvm_todo_vm_classes_26.cpp to be just:

```
#include "Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_mem_region__Vclpkg__DepSet_hf0d4cbc1__0.cpp"
```

still failed, but compiling that file directly passes!

```
g++ -O0 -I. -Wall -Wextra -Wfloat-conversion -Wlogical-op -Werror -I/svaha/wsnyder/SandBox/homecvs/v4/verilator/test_regress/../include -I/svaha/wsnyder/SandBox/\
homecvs/v4/verilator/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TIMING=1 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-pro\
tection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-var\
iable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT -fcoroutines -c -o Vt_uvm_todo_vm_classes_26.o Vt_uvm_todo_uvm_pkg__03a__03auvm_mem_region__Vc\
lpkg__DepSet_hf0d4cbc1__0.cpp
```

This appears a GCC issue specifically around the gcc 11.4 era.  clang works.

I'm disabling the -Wsubobject-linkage warning to make progress.
